articles.title: San Dimas Valley Frontispiece
articles.complete_text:
SAN DIMAS VALLEY—AFTER THE THIEF WHO REPENTED ON THE CROSS

Photo by Courtesy of Pictorial California
articles.notes: This is a frontispiece image with caption. The image shows a forest scene with trees and a stream, and the caption explains that San Dimas Valley was named after the thief who repented on the cross.

articles.title: The Little Grandmother Lucy R. Scott
articles.author: Lucy R. Scott
articles.notes: The article is not present in the provided PDF page images (pages 450-453). The article should appear on page 426 according to the table of contents, but the provided images are from much later pages in the magazine.
